prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **Mulliner Performance Engine Calibration** for the **6.0L twin-turbocharged W12 (engine code: CREWE-W12-6.0TT)** utilizing a **Motec M182 ECU** with a custom fueling map optimized for **102-octane race fuel**, increasing boost pressure from 1.4 bar to **1.8 bar** via **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos** with billet compressor wheels, paired with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio)** and **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** for sustained 850 hp at 6,200 RPM and 950 Nm of torque at 4,500 RPM

Installation of a **Mulliner-developed carbon-fiber driveshaft** with **GKN VL3 constant-velocity joints** and a **Quaife ATB helical LSD (QDF15H)** in the rear differential to handle the increased torque, alongside a **Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilover suspension** with **Eibach ERS race springs (800 lb/in front, 900 lb/in rear)** and **Mulliner-spec anti-roll bars (28mm front, 25mm rear)** for reduced body roll during high-speed cornering

Integration of a **Mulliner Carbon-Ceramic Brake System (CCBS)** featuring **6-piston Brembo GT-R calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear)** with **420mm x 40mm carbon-ceramic rotors (front) and 380mm x 34mm (rear)**, paired with **Pagid RS29 racing brake pads** and a **Mulliner-spec brake cooling duct kit** with **3D-printed titanium air guides** to prevent fade during track use
estetica: Application of a **Mulliner-exclusive 'Aerodynamic Carbon Package'** featuring a **full carbon-fiber front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via Mulliner Dynamic Drive system)**, **side skirts with integrated NACA ducts for rear brake cooling**, and a **fixed carbon-fiber rear wing with a 1,200mm span and dual-plane design (adjustable angle of attack via electric actuators)** for optimized downforce at speeds above 120 mph

Installation of **Mulliner 'Blackline' forged alloy wheels (22x10.5 front, 22x12.5 rear)** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (285/30 R22 front, 335/25 R22 rear)** and **HRE FlowForm center-lock adapters**, paired with a **custom Mulliner 'Dark Chrome' finish** and **laser-etched Bentley winged-B logos** on the wheel centers

Replacement of all exterior chrome trim with **Mulliner 'Meteorite' satin-finish titanium accents**, including **door handles, window surrounds, and grille mesh**, alongside a **full bespoke 'Aurora' paint scheme** featuring **PPG 'Liquid Crystal' flakes** with a **hand-polished mirror finish**, complemented by **Mulliner 'Illuminated Door Sills'** with **electroluminescent Bentley logos** and **carbon-fiber mirror caps with integrated LED turn signals**
